title: Add debounce utility to timing-helpers.ts
description: Create a debounce utility function with signature `debounce<T extends (...args: any[]) => void>(fn: T, delayMs: number): T` in `src/utils/timing-helpers.ts` with tests. This is a simplified version distinct from the existing feature-rich `debounce.ts`.
existing_patterns: src/utils/debounce.ts - existing debounce with leading/trailing options; new simplified version should be simpler without options
src/utils/throttle.ts - similar timing utility pattern with same file-per-utility convention
src/utils/debounce.test.ts - comprehensive test patterns using vitest fake timers (beforeEach vi.useFakeTimers, vi.advanceTimersByTime)
